message:
fix(mobile): improve scroll initialization and view-mode-toggle layout

- Use useLayoutEffect for renderer/wheel handler setup to prevent stuck scroll
- Add visibleRange check to touchAction for proper gesture initialization
- Fix view-mode-toggle sizing with flex: 0 0 auto to prevent shrinking
- Add sequence control button exceptions for touch targets

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
